actions-list.actionItem: The Speaker announced that the House do now adjourn pursuant to clause 13 of Rule I. The next meeting is scheduled for 2:30 p.m. on April 13, 2026.

actions-list.header: Commission on the National Defense Strategy
actions-list.actionItem: Pursuant to section 1095 of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal year 2026 (Public Law 119-60), the Democratic Leader appointed the Honorable Jane Harman of Venice, California.
The Chair led the House in reciting the Pledge of Allegiance to the Flag.
Pursuant to clause 13 of Rule I, the Journal of the last day's proceedings was approved.
Today's prayer was offered by the House Chaplain, Chaplain Margaret Grun Kibben.
The Speaker designated the Honorable Christopher H. Smith to act as Speaker pro tempore for today.
The House convened, starting a new legislative day.
